home.metaTitle: Mintzo — dictation and transcription in Basque and French, on Mac
home.metaDescription: System-wide dictation and audio file transcription in Basque and French, 100% local on your Mac. Free and open source.
home.heroSub: Dictation and transcription in Basque and French, 100% local on your Mac. Your voice never leaves your machine.
home.windowAlt: The Mintzo Mac app window: history of dictations and files, transcriptions in Basque and French
home.hudAlt: The dictation capsule: language, red waveform and timer
home.dictBody: Press a key, speak, and the corrected text lands at your cursor — in any application.
home.dictCaption: The capsule lives next to your cursor: it listens, transcribes, pastes.
home.voiceBody: Drop a WhatsApp voice message (.opus), a voice memo (.m4a) or an .mp3 into Mintzo: it comes back transcribed and corrected.
home.voiceDemoOut: Le devis part ce soir, je t’appelle après la réunion pour valider les délais.
home.localBody: Everything happens on your machine, even offline. Nothing is sent anywhere: no server, no account, no tracker. Nothing to delete, since nothing ever leaves.
home.how2Desc: Whisper large-v3, fine-tuned for Basque — whisper.cpp.
home.how3Desc: Latxa fixes spelling, punctuation and capitalisation, without changing the meaning — llama.cpp.
home.installMacReq: For Apple Silicon Macs, macOS 15 or later.
home.installMac1: Unzip, then drag Mintzo into Applications.
home.installMac2: On first launch, macOS blocks the app (unsigned development build, this is expected). Open System Settings › Privacy & Security, scroll to the Mintzo message and click “Open Anyway”.
home.installMac3: Follow the assistant: microphone access, then the Basque model (~3 GB, downloaded once).
home.creditsIntro: Mintzo is built on the work of the Basque language-technology community.
home.creditHitzDesc: creator of the Latxa language models; Latxa is the heart of the correction pass.
home.creditCvDesc: a free corpus built from volunteers’ voices — the foundation of Basque voice technology. You can help too.
home.creditGgmlDesc: the engines that make inference possible (MIT).

privacy.metaDescription: Everything happens on your Mac. Nothing is sent, nothing is kept.
privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.macP1: Mintzo is a Mac app: audio, transcription and correction all happen entirely on your machine. Nothing is sent to a server, there is no account. Once the models are downloaded, the app works offline.
privacy.cookiesP1: This site uses no cookies, no analytics, no third-party services — fonts included, everything is served from our domain. No ads, no measuring of your browsing.
